name: TRPG Runtime V2
description: Structured TRPG world-store tools for OpenClaw sessions (V2).

worldRoot.description: Optional absolute or resolvable path to world root. Defaults to extension-local world directory.

allowPatchApply.description: When false, trpg_patch_apply always denies writes.

allowedAgentIds.description: Only these agent ids may execute tools. Empty array allows all agents.

traceMaxEvents.description: Maximum retained runtime trace events per session.

panelDispatchTtlSec.description: Seconds before prepared panel dispatch is treated as expired.

analyzerMemoryTtlSec.description: TTL for analyzer memory cache; cache is non-authoritative.

debugRuntimeSignals.description: Show raw drift/debug runtime signals in panel UI.

worldRoot.label: World Root
worldRoot.help: Use only when workspace-based auto-resolution is not desired.

allowPatchApply.label: Allow Patch Apply
allowPatchApply.help: Keep disabled unless you intentionally allow writes from trpg_patch_apply.

allowedAgentIds.label: Allowed Agent IDs
allowedAgentIds.help: Restrict tool execution to dedicated agents. Leave empty to allow all agents.

traceMaxEvents.label: Trace Max Events
traceMaxEvents.help: Keep runtime trace bounded per session.

panelDispatchTtlSec.label: Panel Dispatch TTL (sec)
panelDispatchTtlSec.help: Prepared dispatch expires after this window.

analyzerMemoryTtlSec.label: Analyzer Memory TTL (sec)
analyzerMemoryTtlSec.help: Analyzer cache TTL; does not affect deterministic source-of-truth.

debugRuntimeSignals.label: Debug Runtime Signals
debugRuntimeSignals.help: Enable raw drift/debug values in Sub UI.
